steps.title: Locate the stated reason for creation
steps.content: The task asks you to specify why the Mayflower Compact was created. The notes provide the direct answer: “It was created in 1620 to establish a common government.” This is the decisive clue—it's the stated purpose.

steps.title: Match the purpose to the choices
steps.content: Choice C states that the Mayflower Compact “was created to establish a common government”—the exact reason from the notes. Choices A and B focus on what the signatories wanted to do, while D provides biographical details, but none specify why the document was created. That matches choice C — C is correct.
